title: dortmanna divaricata
intro: Dortmanna divaricata, also known as the Sea Pinks or Thrift, is a low-growing, flowering plant native to coastal areas in Europe and North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and astringent properties, which have been used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Dortmanna divaricata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide antioxidant properties. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a popular natural remedy for various health issues.
